ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE ANSWER GWAC EXPIRED JUNE 30, 2009, AND NO NEW ORDERS ARE BEING PLACED. EXISTING TASK ORDERS MAY HAVE A PERFORMANCE PERIOD OF FIVE YEARS.

entry.title: GWAC GS09K99BHD0003 (PA26) awarded to COMPUTER SCIENCES CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ANSWER S SCOPE COVERS THE FULL SPECTRUM OF IT AND PROVIDES THE FLEXIBILITY NEEDED TO ACQUIRE AN INTEGRATED SOLUTION THAT INCORPORATES EQUIPMENT, HARDWARE, SOFTWARE, AND OTHER DIRECT COSTS INTEGRAL AND NECESSARY TO THE IT SERVICE REQUIREMENTS. ANSWER S TEN YEAR PROVEN TRACK RECORD, UTILIZING EXPERIENCED INDUSTRY PRIME CONTRACTORS, PROVIDES CUSTOMERS COMPREHENSIVE, INNOVATIVE, AND SUSTAINABLE SOLUTIONS TO MEET THEIR MISSION CRITICAL IT REQUIREMENTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.
